FAQ

Common questions before download.

Do I need an account?

No. The desktop app remains offline-first. Online sign-in is optional and is used for cloud-ready saves and sync.

Can I play without internet?

Yes. Built-in games, local multiplayer, saves, tutorials, and stats all work locally.

Will people see the whole source code when they download it?

No casual user will need access to the project source to use the app. The app ships as packaged installers, but desktop JavaScript can never be made perfectly unrecoverable.

How are party rooms handled?

Party rooms are host-authoritative and intended for local/direct sessions rather than a cloud matchmaking backend.

How do I verify a download?

Each stable release publishes a checksums.txt file alongside the installers on GitHub Releases. Compare the SHA256 value on the downloads page or in the checksums file with the file you downloaded.

TableTop Nexus

Offline-first board, card, and party games for polished desktop play.

Published by DigiSolUK. Need help? support@tabletopnexus.app
